description: User-defined gear sets that are not official Mirage Store / glamour dresser sets yet.

idRules.note: Custom set ids must be strings, not numbers, so they never conflict with game item ids or official set ids.

emptyCustomGearSet.name: 自定义套装名称
emptyCustomGearSet.note: 这里写人工判断，例如：暂时不能成套进入幻化柜，未来如果官方补进幻化柜，再同步 gameSetIds。
